steps_en: Proceed as for Cognac Punch (see preceding recipe).
notes_en: This is a concentrate used to prepare Kirsch-flavored punch, following the same finishing method used for the Cognac Punch described earlier in the chapter.

ingredients.name_it: Acqua bollente (con gr. 15 di acido citrico)

steps_en: Combine the ingredients as per the standard punch preparation method described for the Cognac Punch.
notes_en: A Madeira-based punch concentrate; final water addition contains dissolved citric acid.

yield.note: Approximate total from 3-3.5 L wine plus 1 L arrack

ingredients.name_it: Vino rosso generoso del Reno o di Borgogna
ingredients.note: 3-3.5 L, equivalent to the contents of 4 bottles
250-280 g, crushed together with lemon zest

steps_en: Heat 3 to 3.5 liters (the contents of 4 bottles) of full-bodied red wine — Rhine or Burgundy — to boiling.
Dissolve into it 250-280 g of refined sugar, previously crushed together with the yellow zest of 1 or 2 lemons.
While the wine is still hot, mix in one liter (one bottle) of the finest arrack.
Consume the punch while still hot, or let it cool before serving.
notes_en: A simple hot wine punch flavored with citrus zest and finished with arrack.

yield.note: final volume of reduced milk-sugar mixture

ingredients.name_it: Rhum aromatizzato (con vaniglia gr. 2 e noci moscate gr. 20 per litro)
ingredients.name_en: Flavored rum (macerated with 2 g vanilla and 20 g nutmeg per liter)

ingredients.name_it: Latte non scremato litri 7½ e zucchero kg. 6, ridotti per riscaldamento
ingredients.name_en: Non-skimmed milk (7.5 L) and sugar (6 kg), reduced by heating
ingredients.note: Combined and reduced by heating to a final volume of 10 liters

steps_en: Combine the Jamaica rum, alcohol, and vanilla/nutmeg-flavored rum.
Separately heat the non-skimmed milk together with the sugar, reducing the volume down to 10 liters.
Blend the reduced milk-sugar mixture with the rum and alcohol base.
notes_en: An American-style milk punch enriched with rum, alcohol, and aromatic spices, finished with rose essence.
